posts.title: How C-JEPA is teaching AI the physics of the physical world
posts.summary: By forcing AI to understand cause and effect instead of just predicting pixels, C-JEPA is laying the groundwork for smarter, more predictable autonomous systems. The post How C-JEPA is teaching AI the physics of the physical world first appeared on TechTalks .
posts.author: Ben Dickson
